subcodes.first_line: O revered Adib, after thy departure, it hath been deemed expedient that Mr. Sprague also be dispatched to Bombay [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حضرت ادیب بعد از رفتن شما مصلحت چنان دیده شد که مستر اسپرگ نیز ارسال بمبای
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
